Note.title: Study Note
Note.description: An academic study note uploaded by a student or educator

content.description: Full markdown-formatted academic content of the note

uploaderRole.description: Uploader role (Student, Representative, Professor, Lead TA)

uploadedAt.description: ISO timestamp of when the note was uploaded

likes.description: Number of likes the note has received

SystemConfig.title: System Configuration
SystemConfig.description: Global administration parameters and broadcast news banner configuration

announcementActive.description: Whether the marquee is actively displayed

enableSubmissions.description: Whether users are permitted to upload new notes

/notes/{noteId}.description: Collection of all community-sourced study notes

/system_config/{configId}.description: Single-document collection containing global administrator configuration
